title: Software Update - DFU -  Locking mobile device during update
scenario: Firmware update (DFU) continues running or completes successfully when mobile device is locked during the update process
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
3. Initiate a firmware update (DFU) for the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
4. While the DFU is in progress, press the Power button on the mobile device to lock the screen.
5. Wait for a reasonable duration (e.g., 30–60 seconds).
6. Unlock the mobile device and return to the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Observe the DFU status on the Device Settings or Home screen.
expected: The firmware update (DFU) is still running or has successfully completed. No error, interruption, or failure message is shown.
